title: The Roaring Frost
content:
A flock of winds came winging from the North,
    Strong birds with fighting pinions driving forth
        With a resounding call!

    Where will they close their wings and cease their cries--
    Between what warming seas and conquering skies--
        And fold, and fall?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Alice Christiana Thompson Meynell delivers a powerful performance in "The Roaring Frost"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
